description: Fix the schedule logic for the 'Enterprise Software Development Project' by linking 'System Architecture Design' (Row 2), 'Database Schema Design' (Row 3), and 'UI/UX Wireframes' (Row 4) as Finish-to-Start predecessors to the 'Design Review Milestone' (Row 5). Set a baseline (Baseline 0) for the project, then increase the duration of 'System Architecture Design' (Row 2) from 8 days to 12 days. Document the resulting finish variance for the 'Project Completion Milestone' (Row 16) in a text file at /home/ga/Projects/variance_report.txt using the format 'Finish Variance: X days'. Save the project as an XML file to /home/ga/Projects/linked_variance_project.xml.
